item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 103/105/106/107/110 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 15, 04:00 UTC  -  Jun 16, 21:50 UTC

Jun 4, 20:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer on clusters 103/105/106/107/110 in GRA region.

Start time : 15/06/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 21:50 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:

15/06/26 22:00 UTC:
- filerz350 cluster105
- filerz390 cluster107
- filerz654 cluster110
- filerz742 cluster106
- filerz875 cluster103
- filerz877 cluster103

16/06/26 06:00 UTC
- filerz393 cluster107
- filerz657 cluster110
- filerz743 cluster106
- filerz745 cluster106
- filerz879 cluster103
- filerz880 cluster103

16/06/26 22:00 UTC
- filerz394 cluster107
- filerz663 cluster110
- filerz746 cluster106
- filerz747 cluster106
- filerz881 cluster103
- filerz882 cluster103

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 11, 04:31 - 06:31 UTC

Jun 4, 16:45 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our MX Plan offer in GRA region.

Start time : 11/06/2026 04:31 UTC
End time : 11/06/2026 06:31 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 10, 07:00 - 15:00 UTC

May 22, 19:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 10/06/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : During the operation, a few seconds of downtime may occur on the outbound connection.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing a network update, bringing improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

11/06/2026 22:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the Web Hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan incident notification
item.description:
Jun 5, 09:10 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 01/06/2026 18:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 09:03 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The incident is still under investigation.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams and our provider are currently investigating the incident to determine its origin and implement a fix.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:56 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering for MX Plan, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GLOBAL region to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 07/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan delivery outgoing mails to Microsoft domains (outlook.com, live.com and hotmail.com) and Cloudflare domains is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers using MX Plan are temporarily unable to send mails to Microsoft accounts (Outlook, Live, Hotmail) and Cloudflare accounts.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 11, 14:51 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Collaborative solutions offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Domains] - Domains Name incident notification on .DK
item.description:
Jun 5, 08:05 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our .DK Domains offer, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks on .DK domains.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/06/2026 07:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .DK domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform specified operations on .DK domains.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilized to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster124 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 4, 21:07 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 04/06/2026 18:00 UTC
End time : 04/06/2026 21:07 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 4, 18:52 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue on the Cluster124 in GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/06/2026 18:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : An overload has been detected, causing unavailability and increased latency on Cluster124.
Customers Impact : Customers hosted on Cluster124 may currently be unable to access their websites or may experience increased latency.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Filerz71 Cluster120 incident notification

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 4, 11:55 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 04/06/2026 11:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz71 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster120.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Filerz71 Cluster120.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][OverTheBox] - Network Perturbations incident notification
item.description:
Jun 3, 14:53 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our OverTheBox offer has been resolved.

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 20, 16:20 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 20/05/2026 15:15 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : OverTheBox was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily facing issues to connect and use OverTheBox.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident: https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Internet Access] - SDSL/ADSL/FTTH incident notification
item.description:
Jun 3, 14:52 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Internet Access offer has been resolved.

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 20, 16:22 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 20/05/2026 15:15 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 14:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : SDSL, ADSL and FTTH were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to connect to the internet via SDSL, ADSL and FTTH.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by another incident: https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/v8v5rcph9qt3

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [FR][Internet Access] - xDSL/FTTH incident notification
item.description:
Jun 2, 08:04 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting Internet Access offering in departments: 51, 57, 67, 54, 68, 10, 55, 52, 88 and 08 has been resolved.

Start time : 02/06/2026 00:35 UTC
End time : 02/06/2026 07:10 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network configuration problem on the provider’s equipment.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 2, 03:16 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Internet Access offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in France for some xDSL and FTTH access located in departments: 51, 57, 67, 54, 68, 10, 55, 52, 88 and 08.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/06/2026 00:35 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some xDSL and FTTH access located in the specified departments are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access the internet with through their xDSL and FTTH access located in departments: 51, 57, 67, 54, 68, 10, 55, 52, 88 and 08.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU][Web Cloud] - Outlook Web Access mailbox migration
item.description:
May 31, 18:10 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Dec 9, 18:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Nov 21, 09:59 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Cloud offer.

Start time : 09/12/2025 18:00 UTC
End time : 31/05/2026 09:44 UTC
Service impact : Service interruption is expected for a few minutes to a few hours
Affected customers will receive several emails notifying them of the maintenance day.
During this period, emails received will be delivered after the short interruption.

Service improvement : The purpose of this operation is to migrate MXPLAN mailboxes under Outlook Web Access (OWA) to the new Zimbra Webmail.
No action is required from the customers.
For further information, please find attached a link to the FAQ: https://help.ovhcloud.com/csm/fr-mx-plan-zimbra-faq?id=kb_article_view&sysparm_article=KB0061410

Thank you for your understanding.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 13:40 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz10002 experienced significant latency, resulting in degraded performance.
Customers Impact : Customers experienced slower response times and service instability.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Google Tools Incident Notification
item.description:
May 27, 14:41 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting Google tools for our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region has been resolved.

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 27/05/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 26, 13:42 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting Google tools for our Web Hosting offer on the specific GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some request from Google tools are reject when connecting with our GRA clusters.
Customers Impact : Customers may have issues with their Google tools to join their website.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 26, 13:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Web Hosting offer in GRA for the Google tools.

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:00 UTC

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
